ddls:
CREATE TABLE "actions" (
  "action_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each action. */,
  "action_date" TEXT /* Date the action was taken. */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version number for the action. */,
  "action_by" TEXT /* Individual or entity that took the action. */,
  "action_type" TEXT /* Type of action taken (e.g., signed, enacted). */,
  "result" TEXT /* Outcome of the action (e.g., Pass, None). */,
  "action_details" TEXT /* Detailed description of the action taken. */,
  "meeting_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the meeting where the action occurred. */,
  "video_link" TEXT /* Link to the video recording of the meeting. */,
  "action_status" TEXT /* Current status of the action (e.g., pending, approved). */,
  "effective_date" TEXT /* Date when the action becomes effective. */,
  "repeal_date" TEXT /* Date when the action is repealed or expires. */,
  "amendment_id" INTEGER /* Reference to any amendments made to the action. */,
  "public_access" INTEGER /* Flag to indicate if the action details are public. */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("action_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_actions_amendment_id FOREIGN KEY ("amendment_id") REFERENCES actions ("action_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_actions_action_type FOREIGN KEY ("action_type") REFERENCES action_types ("action_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_actions_result FOREIGN KEY ("result") REFERENCES results ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_actions_meeting_id FOREIGN KEY ("meeting_id") REFERENCES meetings ("meeting_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "meetings" (
  "meeting_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each meeting. */,
  "meeting_date" TEXT /* Date the meeting was held. */,
  "agenda" TEXT /* Agenda of the meeting. */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location where the meeting took place. */,
  "meeting_type" TEXT /* Type of meeting (e.g., regular, special). */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the meeting. */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the meeting. */,
  "agenda_link" TEXT /* Link to the detailed agenda document. */,
  "minutes_link" TEXT /* Link to the minutes of the meeting. */,
  "attendance" TEXT /* JSON array of member IDs who attended the meeting. */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("meeting_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "members" (
  "member_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each member. */,
  "member_name" TEXT /* Full name of the member. */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position held by the member (e.g., Council Chair, Member). */,
  "email" TEXT /* Contact email for the member. */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the member. */,
  "term_start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the member's term. */,
  "term_end_date" TEXT /* End date of the member's term. */,
  "biography" TEXT /* Brief biography of the member. */,
  "photo_link" TEXT /* Link to the member's photo. */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("member_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "action_types" (
  "action_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the action type. */,
  "action_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the action type (e.g., signed, enacted). */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the action type. */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category for the action type (e.g., legislative, administrative). */,
  "public_description" TEXT /* Public-friendly description of the action type. */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("action_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the result. */,
  "result_name" TEXT /* Name of the result (e.g., Pass, Fail, None). */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the result. */,
  "public_description" TEXT /* Public-friendly description of the result. */,
  "legal_status" TEXT /* Legal status of the result (e.g., binding, non-binding). */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version. */,
  "action_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the action associated with this version. */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number of the action. */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description or changes made in this version. */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* Member who created the version. */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the version was created. */,
  "public_access" INTEGER /* Flag to indicate if the version details are public. */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_versions_action_id FOREIGN KEY ("action_id") REFERENCES actions ("action_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "action_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry. */,
  "action_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the action associated with this log. */,
  "action_date" TEXT /* Date of the logged action. */,
  "member_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the member who performed the action. */,
  "log_details" TEXT /* Detailed log of the action taken. */,
  "log_type" TEXT /* Type of log entry (e.g., creation, update, deletion). */,
  "public_access" INTEGER /* Flag to indicate if the log entry is public. */,
  "access_level" TEXT /* Access level required to view the log entry (e.g., public, staff, admin). */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_action_logs_action_id FOREIGN KEY ("action_id") REFERENCES actions ("action_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_action_logs_member_id FOREIGN KEY ("member_id") REFERENCES members ("member_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "meeting_videos" (
  "video_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each video entry. */,
  "meeting_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the meeting associated with the video. */,
  "video_link" TEXT /* Link to the video of the meeting. */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the video was uploaded. */,
  "video_type" TEXT /* Type of video (e.g., full meeting, excerpt). */,
  "video_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the video in minutes. */,
  "public_access" INTEGER /* Flag to indicate if the video is public. */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("video_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_meeting_videos_meeting_id FOREIGN KEY ("meeting_id") REFERENCES meetings ("meeting_id")
)
